pr.title: Add AGENTS.md with Cursor Cloud development environment instructions
pr.body: ## Summary Adds `AGENTS.md` with Cursor Cloud-specific development instructions for future cloud agents working on this repository. ### What's included - Project overview (static HTML/CSS/JS app, no build system, no package manager) - Dev server instructions (`python3 test-server.py` on port 8000) - Linting commands (flake8, matching CI workflow) - Key gotchas (no npm/pip deps, localStorage persistence, optional Gemini API) ### Environment verification All pages and assets serve correctly via the Python dev server. Lint checks pass. The app was tested end-to-end: navigating pages, answering practice questions, and verifying dashboard progress tracking. [apush_app_demo_new_user_journey.mp4](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-ceb293fa-c25e-43d1-83d7-85ba87c416c7/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fapush_app_demo_new_user_journey.mp4) [Home page](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-ceb293fa-c25e-43d1-83d7-85ba87c416c7/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fhome_page.webp) [Dashboard with progress tracking](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-ceb293fa-c25e-43d1-83d7-85ba87c416c7/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fdashboard_page.webp) To show artifacts inline, enable in settings.
pr.author: ggvardgit
